systemStatus.headline: Fri Jul 17, 4 AM run. No fresh overnight data yet -- Toast Thu Jul 16 lands ~7:40 AM, Sling Fri Jul 17 lands ~7 AM; sales carry Wed Jul 15 (net $7,562.89, labor 19.2%), schedule carries Thu Jul 16 (9 staff/37.25 hrs). NEW overnight: Joe 5-star for THE BREWHOUSE (farm burger w/ goat cheese + apricot) + 4 new profile photos from Thuy Anh Le. Reviews still need approval to post. Two malformed 24-hr Sling shifts persist (Casey/GM, Rafael/Cook). World Cup Final Sun Jul 19 building (10 covers @ 11 AM).
systemStatus.detail:
Fri Jul 17 04:07 AM PT run.

TOAST (Wed Jul 15, most recent available -- Thu Jul 16 email lands ~7:40 AM): net $7,562.89 / gross $7,819.15 / 411 guests / 158 orders / avg guest $18.40 / labor 19.2% ($1,452). SDLW/4-week comparison email not yet delivered this early run.

SLING (Thu Jul 16, most recent -- Fri Jul 17 report not in until ~7 AM): 9 staff / 9 shifts / 37.25 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT. Two malformed 24-hr shifts again: Casey Smith/GM + Rafael Patricio/Cook (6:11A-6:11A).

REVIEWS: NEW -- Joe 5-star (The Brewhouse, Google via SpotHopper): 'Best farm burger with goat cheese and apricot sauce.' Both listings checked via email notifications. The Brewhouse unanswered incl Joe(new), Matthew Lourie, David Makosch + backlog. Brewhouse Coffee: no NEW reviews; 3 still unanswered (Fleur, Jay Roston, Matt Powers). Drafts prepared, NOT posted -- await Joal approval.

GOOGLE ADS: email side clean -- routine report-ready emails, 0 disapprovals, 0 budget alerts. Watch item: BHC Coffee Search CPC still ~$4.09.

TRIPADVISOR: no ad report. YELP: 0 actionable inquiries (marketing blasts only).

PROFILE: 4 new photos added by Thuy Anh Le (The Brewhouse). 1 Business Profile management request still pending -- verify/deny.

RESERVATIONS: Sun Jul 19 World Cup Final building -- Jason Price (6) + Ruju Patel (4), both 11 AM. Thu Jul 23 Diane Webber (3) 6:30 PM.
